task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the 'Segment Statistics' module in 3D Slicer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D Slicer interface is visible with the 'Segment Statistics' module panel open on the left side.

task_completion.description: The agent computed the segmentation statistics, populating the results table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table is visible within the Segment Statistics module containing rows for 'Right Kidney' (or Label 1) and 'Left Kidney' (or Label 2) with a 'Volume mm3' column populated.

task_completion.description: The agent created or opened the specified text report file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal view shows the file 'kidney_analysis.txt' being edited or displayed.

task_completion.description: The reported Right Kidney volume matches the calculated statistics (converted to mL).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value for 'Right Kidney' in the text file matches the 'Volume mm3' value for Label 1/Right Kidney in the Slicer table divided by 1000.

task_completion.description: The reported Left Kidney volume matches the calculated statistics (converted to mL).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value for 'Left Kidney' in the text file matches the 'Volume mm3' value for Label 2/Left Kidney in the Slicer table divided by 1000.

task_completion.description: The reported volume ratio is calculated correctly (Larger Volume / Smaller Volume).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Volume Ratio' value in the text file equals the larger kidney volume divided by the smaller kidney volume shown in the report.

task_completion.description: The recommendation correctly identifies the larger kidney for preservation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file line starting with 'Preserve:' names the kidney (Right or Left) that has the higher volume in the report.

integrity.description: The agent used the 3D Slicer GUI to derive the values rather than using a pre-calculated script or hardcoded values.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Slicer window active with the Segment Statistics module and data table visible before or during the report creation.

integrity.description: The values in the final report are consistent with the specific data shown in the Slicer interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numbers in the text file match the numbers visible in the Slicer statistics table in the screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent did not access external files or internet sources to find the answer.
integrity.visual_evidence: No web browser or file explorer windows showing 'answer keys' or external data sources are visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: In the segmentation labelmap, Label 1 is the Right Kidney and Label 2 is the Left Kidney. Volume conversion: 1 mL = 1000 mm³. The clinical rule is to PRESERVE the kidney with the larger volume.
